title: The Hand of Noxus
identity: Rising from humble origins to become a bringer of true carnage, Darius cleaves through the empire’s enemies. He’s a mid-range fighter with attacks just as brutal and deadly as his axe.
playstyle: Striker. Rising from humble origins to become a bringer of true carnage, Darius cleaves through the empire’s enemies. He’s a mid-range fighter with attacks just as brutal and deadly as his axe.
strengths: Direct bruiser gameplan with high-impact close-range offense.
Easy-to-understand win condition: get in, hit hard, keep advantage.
Works as a stable damage threat for newer team builders.
weaknesses: Needs help when opponents avoid his preferred range.
Route and matchup details should be verified before ranking partners.
partnerWants: Neutral cover to enter close range
Assist calls that protect heavy commitments
Partners who cash out after his damage threat
teamProvides: Direct bruiser gameplan with high-impact close-range offense.

learningPriorities: Prioritize consistent punish and corner routes.
